title: Thuvia, Maid of Mars
description: Thuvia, Maid of Mars, is the next generation of Barsoomains. Instead of John Carter “Warlord of Mars”, it is his son, Cathoris, that gets to try to rescue the princess Thuvia that has been kidnapped by the evil prince Astok of Dusar. This is another Edgar Burroughs action packed science fiction adventure.Please Note:  This book is easy to read in true text, not scanned images that can sometimes be difficult to decipher.  This eBook has bookmarks at chapter headings and is printable up to two full copies per year.
